narratives.todays_take: BA is in Weakening (56.3, -0.2 drift) as institutional confidence collapses to 32.3 percentile despite strong thesis integrity (81.0). Demand Environment (49.2) is headwind-prone given consumer sentiment (49.8), U6 unemployment (8.2%), and weak housing starts, but not yet recessionary.
narratives.what_would_break: A drop below 50 (Structural Review threshold) would require institutional conviction to fall below ~25 percentile or financial evolution to deteriorate further (OCF margin already negative, gross margin declining -2.4% trend slope). Watch for a reversal of insider buying sentiment or a second negative quarterly earnings revision, either of which would confirm that the 34.5% revenue growth is not translating to margin recovery and would likely trigger a rapid re-rating downward.
